rationale: The citing paper references Thomas (2001) once to support a general background statement that acquisition can affect later retention. It does not discuss that paper's Tobit-with-selection framework, data structure, or findings in any depth, and it does not adopt or test against that methodology. The focal contribution of the citing paper is a VAR-based channel comparison (MKT vs WOM), so this citation functions as broad literature context rather than a direct building block.
